name: Tagetitoxin
description: Tagetitoxin is a bacterial phytotoxin. It preferentially inhibits eukaryotic RNA polymerase.
mechanismOfAction: Tagetitoxin inhibits all RNAP catalytic reactions. Tagetitoxin binding is mediated exclusively through polar interactions with the beta and beta' residues whose substitutions confer resistance to tagetitoxin in vitro.
